---
title: "Meeting Minutes"
toc: true
---

A running record of every team meeting. Each entry notes who attended, what was
discussed, decisions made, and the action items agreed with an owner for each.

## Meeting 1

Date: TBC

Attendees: TBC

Discussion: Project kickoff, challenge selection, division of labour.

Decisions: Building on VAST Challenge 2026 Mini-Challenge 1.

Action items:

- Item, owner, due date
